---
title: "paper title"

pub-authors:
  - list
  - of
  - authors
  - last
  - names
  - only

pub-year: year
date: YYYY-MM-DD
venue: "venue full name"
pub-type: type of publication (e.g., Empirical Article, Review Article, Book Chapter, Popular Writing)
pub-status: publication status (e.g., Published or Preprint)

pdf: filename.pdf
data:
code:
doi: ""
link: ""

abstract: "Paper Abstract"

listing-page: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>.quarto-title-meta { display: none !important; } .quarto-title-block .abstract { display: none !important; }</style>
---

{{< include ../../../assets/_meta-publication.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../assets/_download-buttons.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../assets/_pdf-viewer.qmd >}}
